name: claude-connectors
displayName: Claude Connectors + Desktop extensions + MCP Apps Design
description: MCP connectors (directory + custom), Claude Desktop MCPB packaging, MCP Apps for Claude Desktop (incl. visual + interaction design guidelines), integrations (GitHub / Google / Microsoft / Slack), Agent Skills format (user-facing), Plugins user-facing docs.
